candidateModal.title: Task candidate action
candidateModal.dueDatePh: Leave blank for no due date

dailyStart.title: Start your day
dailyStart.intro: Today's deadlines, review requests, and overdue tasks — all in one place. Pick one to start, or close to skip.

bar.idleHint: Start focusing on this task — actual time will accumulate automatically.
bar.otherHint: Currently focusing on "{{title}}". Switching will auto-stop that session.

settings.sectionDesc: When enabled, a progress widget appears in the sidebar. Easy to turn on and off — no pressure.
settings.enabledHint: When off, the widget is hidden entirely.
settings.idleMinHint: After this period of no activity, the widget gives you a heads up.
settings.autoPauseMinHint: After this much inactivity, the session auto-pauses.
settings.dailyPromptHint: Shows today's tasks when you arrive after login.
